name: phone-at-listings-currency-side-channels-into-contact
description: Real-estate flow. User at the new WEB_COLLECT_LISTINGS_CURRENCY step types their phone instead of a currency. Bot must side-channel the phone into contactPhone (deterministic tryApplyContactFormat — no LLM) AND stay at WEB_COLLECT_LISTINGS_CURRENCY so the currency question gets re-asked. Without the cross-field short-circuit the phone would be read as a (failed) currency and lost.
